title: Add session cleanup utility
description: Create `cleanExpiredSessions(store: SessionStore, maxAgeMs: number): number` in `src/auth/session-cleanup.ts` that removes sessions where `createdAt + maxAgeMs < now` and returns the count of removed sessions. Include co-located tests.
existing_patterns: src/auth/session-store.ts:11-14 - Session interface with createdAt, expiresAt, refreshExpiresAt fields
src/auth/session-store.ts:119-126 - existing cleanup() method that iterates sessions and calls revoke()
src/utils/retry.ts - single-function utility file pattern with typed options
